title: ASR Outdoor Brass Body Nickel Plated Pull Apart Key Ring Travel Accessory
description:
Do you find yourself fumbling with your keys because they're all stuck on one key ring? Never worry about this again with the ASR Outdoor Pull Apart Key Ring! This key ring splits into 2 key rings with the quick release lock and connect, so you can keep your car keys separate from your other keys. This is super helpful if for example you have a separate key for your mail box and hate turning your car off just to get your mail. The key ring has a brass body and is nickel-plated for extra strength and quality. Each split key ring has a 1" diameter and measures just 3" in total length. These key rings are also ideal for use with access control cards, identification, whistles, key FOBs and more! Make sure to grab a few of these to keep your keys organized!
